case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. DAVID B. SOLOMON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON, DAVID B. DOES 1-10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2008
